title: The Long Ships
writer: Berkely Mather, Beverley Cross, Frans G. Bengtsson
actors: Richard Widmark, Sidney Poitier, Russ Tamblyn
plot: A vagabond Viking adventurer and a Moor both compete to find "The Mother of All Voices", a legendary golden bell near the Pillars of Hercules.
awards: Nominated for 1 BAFTA Award1 nomination total
